title: Office TMX Redesign with Limezu Modern Interiors

output.summary: Classified as medium weight. Single-domain game category work: asset copying + TMX data editing.
output.decision: Medium process — auto-approve, no C-suite challenge

output.summary: Read directive brief, vision, preferences, lessons, agent registry. Category: game.
Context loaded: TMX is 32x32 @ 16x16px, 2 existing tilesets (room-builder firstgid=1, furniture firstgid=225). Limezu pack at /Users/yangyang/Downloads/moderninteriors-win.
Single project: limezu-office-redesign. Builder: devon, Reviewers: quinn + sarah, Auditor: sarah. Use Theme_Sorter PNGs not master sheet.

TMX is NOT parsed at runtime — office-layout.ts has hardcoded gidLayers arrays. tilesetCache.ts loads PNGs with hardcoded firstgid. Next firstgid=1073. Right half and bottom of map nearly empty. .tsx files are Tiled metadata, not React. Must update both TMX and office-layout.ts in lockstep.
